sizes.card_title: text-lg sm:text-xl leading-snug font-bold tracking-tight text-white group-hover:text-[#FF3300] transition-colors

layout.container: max-w-screen-2xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

grid.description: The Control Room Grid (Seamless technical borders)
grid.wrapper_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 border-t border-l border-[#262626]
grid.item_classes: border-b border-r border-[#262626] p-6 flex flex-col justify-between min-h-[240px] hover:bg-[#141414] transition-all duration-300 group

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#262626] py-4
header.logo: flex items-center gap-3 text-white font-black tracking-tighter text-2xl uppercase font-sans

filters.button_base: px-4 py-2 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest border transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer

card.tag_base: px-2 py-1 text-[9px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono border bg-transparent

instructions_to_main_agent: BACKEND: Create a SQLite db with table `news_items` (title, url, source, published_at, summary, tags, item_type). Create POST `/api/news` to save items and GET `/api/news` to fetch them.
FRONTEND: Import 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in index.html.
Use Lucide-react for icons (Radar for the logo, ArrowUpRight for the card external links).

LAYOUT: Apply the 'Control Room' grid. The cards container should have top and left borders, and each card has right and bottom borders to create a seamless technical grid. DO NOT use rounded corners or gaps between cards.
BACKGROUND: Use the provided background_image with a fixed 95% opacity black overlay to give a very subtle tactical map texture to the entire app.
CARDS: Title should transition to accent color (#FF3300) on group-hover. The external link icon should also glow/turn red on hover.
TAGS: Tags on cards should match the specified colors in the JSON. If a tag is 'war', use border-[#FF3300] and text-[#FF3300].
TESTING: Add the specified data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
